steps.title: Identify the rhetorical goal
steps.content: The question asks to present the methods used in the 2020 study—the how, not the what-they-found.

steps.title: Apply the goal to the choices
steps.content: Choice D directly states the two methods: tagging ducks with radio frequency ID trackers and recording their nest box visits. The other choices shift focus to results or describe procedures not in the notes. That matches choice D — D is correct.
